title: North Shore Medical Labs ransomware incident

extortion.description: North Shore Medical Labs (NSML) is a full-service clinical reference laboratory, dedicated to serve the individual needs of the healthcare provider through a committed staff, client focused and service oriented organization. NSML is fully accredited and licensed by the College of American Pathologists (CAP), New York State Department of Health, the Center for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CLIA).
